result.summary: Google Cloud Bare Metal Solution exposes a REST management API at `https://baremetalsolution.googleapis.com/` plus `gcloud bms` CLI commands; both use Google Cloud authentication, and the REST API also documents API-key query auth in its discovery document.
result.description: Google Cloud Bare Metal Solution provides managed bare-metal infrastructure in Google regional extensions near Google Cloud regions. It is used to provision and manage bare-metal servers, networks, storage volumes, snapshots, and related resources.

gcp_oauth.label: Google Cloud OAuth 2.0 access token
gcp_oauth.setup: For REST and client-library access, authenticate to Google Cloud and obtain an access token with the `https://www.googleapis.com/auth/cloud-platform` scope. The easiest paths are the Google Cloud auth guides: [Authenticate for using REST](https://docs.cloud.google.com/docs/authentication/rest), [Set up Application Default Credentials](https://docs.cloud.google.com/docs/authentication/provide-credentials-adc), or for CLI usage [Authenticate for the gcloud CLI](https://docs.cloud.google.com/sdk/docs/authenticate).

gcp_api_key.label: Google Cloud API key
gcp_api_key.setup: Create and manage an API key in Google Cloud using [Manage API keys](https://docs.cloud.google.com/docs/authentication/api-keys). Google Cloud's discovery document for this API says the query parameter `key` is accepted and is required unless you provide an OAuth 2.0 token.

packages.runtimeHint: install via the gcloud CLI installer
